title: Glazed Egyptian Lamb Skillet
description: A fatty and velvety lamb dish glazed with honey and spices, perfect for a date night in a single skillet.
instructions: Heat a yakimono grill pan over high heat and add olive oil to coat the surface.
Season the lamb slices with salt, pepper, cumin, coriander, paprika, and cinnamon.
Place the lamb in the hot pan and sear each side for 2 minutes until a deep brown crust forms.
Reduce heat to medium, add lemon juice and honey to the pan and swirl to coat the meat.
Simmer the lamb for another 3 minutes, spooning the glaze over each piece until it thickens and becomes sticky.
Add minced garlic and cook for 30 seconds to release aroma without burning.
Remove the skillet from heat and let the lamb rest for 2 minutes to lock in juices.
Serve the glazed lamb hot, optionally dashing a few extra spoonfuls of glaze across the plate for extra sweetness.
